formsErrorNumberRequired: Value must be a whole number
helpParameterBarcodesFile: CSV file describing which barcodes were used on which sample
helpParameterMinKnowFolder: Folder containing sequencing reads from MinKnow
helpParameterName: Run name to appear in report
helpParameterNotes: Miscellaneous notes to appear at top of report
helpParameterThreads: Number of execution threads which will be used during the analysis run
helpSettingAllMetadataToHeader: Parse all fields from input barcodes file and include in the output fasta headers. Be aware that spaces in metadata will disrupt the record id, so avoid these.
helpSettingDateStamp: Append datestamp to output folder name, if not overwriting
helpSettingInstitute: Institute name to appear in report
helpSettingNegativeControl: Name of negative control sample. If multiple samples, supply as comma-separated string of sample names. e.g. sample01,sample02
helpSettingOrientation: Orientation of barcodes in wells on a 96-well plate. If `well` is supplied as a column in the barcodes file, this default orientation will be overwritten.
helpSettingOutputFolder: Base folder into which all output will be written
helpSettingOutputIntermediateFiles: Output all intermediate files, for development or debugging purposes
helpSettingOutputPrefix: Prefix of output folder and report name
helpSettingPositiveControl: Name of positive control sample. If multiple samples, supply as comma-separated string of sample names. e.g. sample01,sample02
helpSettingProtocol: Sample type for this run, which determines which protocol will be used
helpSettingUserName: User name to appear in report
provideInitialSettings: Please enter some details before proceeding. You can always alter these later.
